{# Vendor detail partial — tabbed layout with safety review, analytics, enrich, click-to-call. Receives: vendor, contacts, recent_sightings, safety_band, safety_summary, safety_flags. Called by: vendor_detail_partial route in htmx_views.py. Depends on: brand palette, partials/shared/safety_review.html, partials/shared/enrich_button.html, partials/shared/source_badge.html. #} {{ vendor.display_name }} — Vendors — AvailAI
{# ── Header Card ─────────────────────────────────────────── #}
{# Initial avatar #}
{{ vendor.display_name[:1]|upper }}

{{ vendor.display_name }}

{% if vendor.is_blacklisted %} Blacklisted {% endif %}
{% if vendor.domain %} {{ vendor.domain }} {% endif %} {% if vendor.hq_city %} | {{ vendor.hq_city }}{% if vendor.hq_country %}, {{ vendor.hq_country }}{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if vendor.industry %} | {{ vendor.industry }} {% endif %}
{# Vendor score (large) #} {% if vendor.vendor_score and not vendor.is_blacklisted %}

{{ "%.0f"|format(vendor.vendor_score) }}

Score

{% endif %} {# Toggle blacklist #} {# Edit #} {# Enrich #} {% set entity_type = "vendor" %} {% set entity_id = vendor.id %} {% include "htmx/partials/shared/enrich_button.html" %}
{# ── 4-Stat Row ──────────────────────────────────────────── #}

{{ vendor.sighting_count or 0 }}

Sightings

{{ "%.0f%%"|format(vendor.overall_win_rate * 100) if vendor.overall_win_rate else "—" }}

Win Rate

{{ vendor.total_pos or 0 }}

Total POs

{{ "%.0fh"|format(vendor.avg_response_hours) if vendor.avg_response_hours else "—" }}

Avg Response Time

{# Enrich results placeholder #}
{# AI Insights — lazy-loaded #}
{# ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────── #}
{% for tab_id, tab_label in [ ('overview', 'Overview'), ('contacts', 'Contacts'), ('find_contacts', 'Find Contacts'), ('emails', 'Emails'), ('analytics', 'Analytics'), ('offers', 'Offers'), ('reviews', 'Reviews') ] %} {% endfor %}
{# Tab content — overview loaded inline on first load #}
{# Safety review block #} {% if safety_band %} {% include "htmx/partials/shared/safety_review.html" %} {% else %}

Vendor Trust & Safety Review

{% endif %} {# Contact info card #} {% if vendor.emails or vendor.phones or vendor.website %}

+{{ vendor.emails|length - 3 }} more

{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% if vendor.phones %}

Phones

{% for p in vendor.phones[:3] %}

{{ p }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Contacts table (overview summary) #} {% if contacts %}

Contacts ({{ contacts|length }})

{% for c in contacts[:5] %} {% endfor %}
Name Title Email Phone
{{ c.full_name or "—" }} {{ c.title or "—" }} {% if c.email %} {{ c.email }} {% else %} — {% endif %} {% if c.phone %} {{ c.phone }} {% else %} — {% endif %}
{% if contacts|length > 5 %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Recent sightings #} {% if recent_sightings %}

{% if mpn_filter %} Sightings for {{ mpn_filter }} {% else %} Recent Sightings {% endif %}

{% for s in recent_sightings %} {% endfor %}
MPN Qty Price Source Date
{{ s.mpn_matched or "—" }} {{ "{:,}".format(s.qty_available) if s.qty_available else "—" }} {{ "$%.4f"|format(s.unit_price) if s.unit_price else "—" }} {% set source_name = s.source_type %} {% include "htmx/partials/shared/source_badge.html" %} {{ s.created_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') if s.created_at else "—" }}
{% endif %}
